summary: Completed comprehensive Phase 2 backend testing of Polymarket Edge OS. All 17 test cases passed (100% success rate). Engine successfully starts with all Phase 2 components (market_data, price_feeds, risk_engine, execution_engine, persistence), ingests live market data from Polymarket Gamma API (200 markets), streams BTC/ETH spot prices from Binance WebSocket, processes paper orders through complete trading pipeline, enforces risk controls and kill switch, and provides real-time WebSocket streaming.

performance_notes.issue: Takes ~9-10 seconds to stop engine cleanly
performance_notes.impact: Expected behavior for graceful component shutdown

passed_tests: GET /api/ returns correct service name, version, and online status
GET /api/health returns engine status (stopped/running) and trading mode
POST /api/engine/start successfully starts all Phase 2 components
GET /api/status after engine start shows 200 markets tracked and live BTC/ETH spot prices
GET /api/markets returns 200 markets sorted by volume (top market: 90M+ volume)
GET /api/markets/summary returns total_markets=200 and top_by_volume list
GET /api/health/feeds returns health metrics with timestamps
POST /api/test/paper-order submits paper order through complete pipeline
GET /api/trades returns 2 trade records after paper order execution
GET /api/positions returns 1 position after paper order execution
GET /api/orders returns 2 order records after paper order execution
WebSocket /api/ws streams real-time state snapshots with market data and spot prices
